title: gcd/lcm/factorial/comb/perm
manager: The integer-combinatorics builtins — gcd, lcm, factorial, combinations, permutations — for machines doing scheduling, counting, or number-theory logic without hand-rolling the recursion and getting the base case wrong. Blessed, tested, and exact on the integer types, so a scheduling machine that computes how many arrangements exist gets a right answer rather than a plausible one.
cs: gcd/lcm/factorial/comb/perm over integer types; exact; factorial/comb/perm may need longint (W6.3) to hold their range.
